vulnerabilities.title: Path Traversal in http-file-server
vulnerabilities.description:
All versions of `http-file-server` are vulnerable to Path Traversal. The package fails to sanitize URLs, allowing attackers to access server files outside of the served folder using relative paths.


## Recommendation

No fix is currently available. Consider using an alternative package until a fix is made available.

vulnerabilities.title: Cross-Site Scripting in http-file-server
vulnerabilities.description:
All versions of `http-file-server` are vulnerable to Cross-Site Scripting (XSS). The package fails to sanitize filenames, allowing attackers to execute arbitrary JavaScript in the victim's browser through files with names containing malicious code.


## Recommendation

No fix is currently available. Consider using an alternative package until a fix is made available.
